description: Inspired by pretty women and feminity, this fastrack watch , with its stylish dial. Minimalist design, classic round face and a steel strap to give it a modern feel backed up by a steel case for optimal performance. Wear this with trendy, casual ensembles - colour-pop tees, denims and casual sandals or shoes.Case diameter: 20 mmCase thickness: 5 mmDial shape: RoundSteel case with a fixed bezel for added durability, style and comfortSteel strap with a tang clasp for comfort and styleWhite and orange dial with branding at the 6 hour mark and brand logo at the 12 hour mark Quartz movement of time display Screw to reset timeSolid case back made of stainless steel for enhanced durabilityWater resistant up to 30 meters allowing you to use it when washing your hands or in light rain
